login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to Acme Analytics Dashboard

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send you a reset link
forgot.sent_body: If an account matches that email, a password-reset link is on its way.
forgot.failed: Couldn't send the reset link. Please try again.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account
reset.success_body: Your password has been reset — you can sign in with it now.
reset.invalid_link: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from the sign-in page.
reset.failed: Couldn't reset your password. The link may have expired — request a new one.

password_min_length: Password must meet the minimum length
unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
invalid_credentials: Invalid username or password. Please check your credentials and try again.

features.i18n: Bilingual & RTL-ready out of the box

session.expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again

errors.access_denied: You do not have permission to access this resource.
errors.network_error: Connection to server failed. Please check your internet connection.
